prerequisites.value: Draconic Aspect or dragon-scaled racial trait, kobold.

description.value: **Benefit:** Choose an additional color for your Draconic Aspect feat or dragon-scaled racial trait. You gain the benefits of both this color and the color you originally chose. (If you have both Draconic Aspect and dragon-scaled, this benefit applies to both.) If you gain abilities that rely on scale color, choose which color gains the benefits.
